/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libpkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/pkg_srv__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/pkg_srv/srv/detail/mission_control__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/bridges/jetson_workspace/build/pkg_srv:/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: libpkg_srv__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
